source_title: 09 Shrine - Raya and the Last Dragon/03 Creating a Water Material

evidences.content: 现在，我们要做的最后一件事就是创建一个水材质。 Now the last thing we should do here is let's just create a water material. 因此，我将在 UEVFX 101 文件夹下创建一个新文件夹，然后在 assets 文件夹下创建一个新文件夹，并将其命名为 "水"。 So I'll do this by creating a new folder under our UEVFX 101 folder and then under assets and we'll just call this water. 我想创建一个新的材料实例。 And I want to create a new material instance. 因此，我要进入我们的母版素材文件夹，然后我们就有了之前制作的表面母版素材。 So I'm going to go into our master materials folder and then we have that surface master material that we were making earlier. 我只是要点击并拖动它，然后复制一份，然后我们就把它叫做水母版。 I'm just gonna click and drag that over and make a copy and then we'll call this water master. 然后，让我们在场景中拖入一个平面，并将此材质分配给它。 And then let's drag a plane into our scene and assign this material to it. 这样我们就可以立即预览。 And that way we can preview it right away. 现在，如果我看一下我们的参照物，就会发现水是相当透明的。 Now if I look at our reference here we can see that this water is fairly transparent. 所以我们要建造一个可以透过水面看到的东西。 So we're gonna want to build something where we can see through the surface of the water. 但水面本身应该开始反射周围的光线，就像我们在岩石上看到的闪亮反光一样。 But the water surface itself should start to reflect the light around it just like we're getting the shiny reflections on the rocks themselves. 我们也应该把它带到水上。 We should be getting that on the water as well. 因此，让我们快速创建一个主素材来实现这一目标。 So let's quickly build a master material that does that. 因此，我们要打开水主素材，然后抓取小抄，我们可以从这里抓取一些资产。 So we'll open up the water master material and then grab the cheat sheet and we can grab a couple assets from inside of here. 所以，首先让我们把它做成水上飞机的样子。 So first let's make this look like a plane of water. 因此，让我们先交换一下纹理。 So let's swap out our textures first. 对于我们的基色贴图，让我们输入白色，这里应该会有一些白色的正方形纹理，我们可以将它们带入。 For our base color map let's type in white and there should be some white square textures that we can bring in here. 然后把色调改为深色和略带蓝色。 And then let's just change the tint to something dark and slightly blue. 所以，给它一点蓝绿色调，然后把这个值设得非常低，比如 0.05 之类。 So give it just a little bit of blue green tint and then make this value something really low like 0.05 something like that. 对于粗糙度来说，水是完全光滑的，所以我们可以覆盖粗糙度贴图，这样就不需要它了。 For roughness water is completely glossy so we can just override our roughness map so we won't need that there. 然后我们将粗糙度增益设置为零，这样就会非常光滑和反光。 And we'll set our roughness gain to zero and that way it's really glossy and reflective. 然后，我们向下滚动法线贴图，替换这里的纹理。 And then for our normal map if we scroll down and replace our texture here. 如果我们输入 "水"，引擎会弹出几个选项。 If we type in water there's going to be a couple options that pop up for us that are just included in the engine. 你可以把这些都擦干，但我要把这个设置为 "水N"，然后按 "应用"，这样纹理就会在这里更新。 And you can dry any of these out but I'm going to set this to water n and then press apply so that texture updates over here. 然后，我们可以在这里点击并拖动正常强度的标量参数，看看这里适合使用什么样的值。 And then here we can click and drag the scalar parameter of our normal intensity and see what sort of value is appropriate here. 然后，如果我们进入小抄，就可以抓取我们之前说过的平移器节点。 And then if we go into our cheat sheet we're going to want to grab this panner node that we talked about earlier. 这就是 UVs 的评论。 Which is underneath this UVs comment. 然后，我们将把法线贴图做成动画，让水面像水一样平移和移动。 And then we're going to animate our normal map to give us a water surface that kind of pans around and moves like water would. 但它不会只向一个方向平移，所以我们要使用两个不同的法线贴图，然后将它们相乘。 But it wouldn't just pan in one direction so we'll use two different normal maps and multiply them together. 因此，我将使用 Alt 和鼠标中键来创建一个路由点。 So to do this I'm going to alt and middle mouse click to create a reroute dot. 然后我按住 Ctrl 键，左键单击，把它移到这里。 And then I'm going to ctrl and left click to move this over here. 我们将其插入坐标，然后创建速度 x 和速度 y 标量参数。 We'll plug this into our coordinates and then we'll create a speed x and a speed y scalar parameter. 然后，我们将追加矢量，将这两个值追加到一起，并插入速度输入。 And then we'll append vector to append these two together and plug into our speed input. 我们将把它们归入标准组类别。 And we'll put these under the normals group category. 我将默认把这两个值都设置为 0.1。 And I'm going to set both of these to 0.1 by default. 现在，让我们把它插入法线贴图的 UV 引脚。 And then for now let's plug this into the UV pin of our normal map here. 现在你可以看到，我们开始有了这个动画表面。 And now you can see we are starting to get this animated surface. 然后，我们只需按下 "应用 "键，它就会填充到我们的关卡中。 And then we just have to press apply for it to populate into our level. 但这个速度还是很快的，所以我先把它调到 0.01。 But this is still pretty fast so I'm going to set this down to 0.01 to start. 在这种情况下，我们要复制并粘贴法线贴图和平移器节点。 And in this case we're going to copy and paste both our normal map and our panner nodes. 然后将速度 x 和 y 乘以负 1。 And then we're going to take our speed x and y and multiply this by negative 1. 然后，我将回到小抄，抓取这个混合角度修正法线。 And then I'm going to go back to the cheat sheet and grab this blend angle corrected normals. 我还要在这里加上这句话。 And I'm even going to add this comment here. 它的作用是将两个法线贴图组合在一起。 What this does is it combines two normal maps together. 这些都是数据通道，必须进行非常具体的计算 These are data channels and there's very specific calculations that have to happen 使它们相互叠加，并保持正常偏移。 for these to multiply on top of each other and keep their normal offset. 这就是我们要使用该节点的原因。 So that's why we want to use that node. 现在，我们的水材料有了更多的细节。 And now we have a lot more detail in our water material. 我们还可以改变正常的强度。 And we can still change around the normal intensity. 我暂且保留原样，但你可以看到我们的两种声音正朝着相反的方向发展 I'll leave this as is for now but you can start to see our two noises going in opposite directions 以增加随机性。 to add a lot of randomness to this. 我们可以暂时保持这种微妙的感觉，以后再回头调整。 And we can keep this fairly subtle for now and we can always go back and adjust this later. 还有，如果你要制作水材料，也要知道这一点、 And just so you know if you're ever making a water material, 如果您需要让水彩颜色更深，您有两种选择。 if you ever need your watercolor to go darker you have two options. 首先，将漫反射颜色全部改为黑色 The first is to change your diffuse color all the way to black 这样就能更好地保持黑暗。 which will do a better job of keeping this even darker. 但如果你想更进一步，这就进入了作弊领域 But if you want to go even further this is getting us into cheating territory 在这里，我们打破了《PBR》的规则，保持了一切物理上的准确性。 where we're kind of breaking the PBR rules where we're keeping everything physically accurate. 但增加金属含量也会使水的颜色变深。 But by increasing your metallic this will also darken the color of the water. 不过，我还是暂时把它保持为零。 But I'll keep this at zero for now. 我们将保持逼真，并把水的颜色调得很淡。 We'll keep it photorealistic and we'll keep that water tint color really low.
evidences.speaker: instructor
